occurrence_sentence: Tiqker's groundbreaking accuracy comes from precise laser and frequency comb systems. With photonic-integrated circuit (PIC)-based lasers and miniature PIC-based frequency combs, future Tiqker devices will shrink from rack-mounted systems to chip-scale modules. Integrated photonics enables rugged, low-cost clocks ideal for aerospace, defense, and commercial markets. A PIC-based Tiqker module will be utilized in other Infleqtion quantum systems for both timing and laser frequency control.

Infleqtion's [Quantum Spectrum Sensing](https://infleqtion.com/quantum-spectrum/) leverages Rydberg atoms to detect extremely weak signals across a wide spectrum.

mentions.occurrence_sentence: Infleqtion's high-quality [UHV glass cells](https://infleqtion.com/quantum-cores/uhv-glass-cells) offer new optical access to in-vacuum experiments.

mentions.role_in_text: Provider of quantum cores and related technologies
mentions.occurrence_sentence: The [doubleMOT](https://infleqtion.com/quantum-cores/doublemot) is a self-contained, tabletop, UHV system that makes it easy to cool and trap atoms, with applications ranging from fundamental quantum physics research to developing sensors and new quantum technologies.
The coil assembly makes it easy to mount and align MOT coils around a miniMOT V2, doubleMOT, or RuBECi cell.
The [Tri Coil Assembly

The Fixed Picas is a compact, alignment-free beam delivery package. It produces a 2D+ MOT beam configuration with three user-supplied fiber-coupled light inputs, capable of producing a cold atom flux of >10⁹ atoms per second when used with Infleqtion's CASC, Cold Atom Source Cell.

A PIC-based Tiqker module will be utilized in other Infleqtion quantum systems for both timing and laser frequency control.

Tiqker's groundbreaking accuracy comes from precise laser and frequency comb systems. With photonic-integrated circuit (PIC)-based lasers and miniature PIC-based frequency combs, future Tiqker devices will shrink from rack-mounted systems to chip-scale modules. Integrated photonics enables rugged, low-cost clocks ideal for aerospace, defense, and commercial markets. A PIC-based Tiqker module will be utilized in other Infleqtion quantum systems for both timing and laser frequency control.
